content.hint: 表达对对方周到准备的赞赏，常用积极肯定的短语
content.situation: 客户到达公司，接待员引导其前往会议室，并告知会议准备就绪。
content.speakerText: I'll take you to the meeting room now. The materials are ready and the team is waiting.
content.speakerTextCn: 我现在带您去会议室，材料已经准备好了，团队也在等您。
content.knowledgePoint: 表达感谢与赞赏的礼貌回应

content.hint: 确认环境合适时，常用简洁积极的词表达满意
content.situation: 接待员带客户走进会议室，客户环顾四周后想确认是否为正确场地。
content.speakerText: This is the room we've reserved for your session.
content.speakerTextCn: 这就是我们为您预订的会议室。
content.knowledgePoint: 确认场合合适的标准回应
content.responseTemplate: ___, this looks perfect for our discussion.

content.hint: 对细致准备表示高度认可，需使用积极且正式的赞美表达
content.situation: 客户刚坐下，接待员提醒会议设备已调试完毕，等待客户确认。
content.speakerText: The audio system and screen are all set up for you.
content.speakerTextCn: 音频系统和屏幕都已经为您设置好了。
content.knowledgePoint: 对专业服务表示认可的高频表达
content.responseTemplate: ___, I really appreciate your attention to detail.

content.hint: 这是对引导的简洁回应，常用在口语中表示立即行动
content.template: Let me show you to the meeting room — your team's already here. Okay, let's ___.
content.knowledgePoint: 固定表达：let's go（表示同意并立即行动）

content.hint: 用于赞美对方考虑周到，是职场中表达感激的高频词
content.template: We've got the projector set up and your agenda on the table. That's so ___ — you've really thought of everything!
content.knowledgePoint: 形容词搭配：thoughtful（周到的）用于赞美服务细节

content.hint: 在引导过程中提供便利服务时的常用动词
content.template: I'll take you to the main conference room. Would you like me to ___ you a drink while you wait?
content.knowledgePoint: 动词搭配：bring sb. sth.（为某人拿来某物）
